title: rubus luchunensis var. luchunensis
intro: Rubus luchunensis var. luchunensis, also known as Luchun raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus luchunensis var. luchunensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
